diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A neuralgic prodrome preceding a dermatomal rash is characteristic of zoster.
Contact dermatitis is itchy, not deeply neuropathic.

symptoms.symptom_name: Strictly unilateral dermatomal grouped vesicles stopping at the midline

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A unilateral dermatomal vesicular band stopping at the midline is diagnostic of zoster.

symptoms.symptom_name: No exertional/crushing pain, radiation, sweating or true breathlessness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of cardiac features lowers ACS/PE probability, but ECG/auscultation are needed to exclude fully.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: ECG if any cardiac features / diagnostic doubt (in person)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude ACS given chest pain in an older adult; cannot be done remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Clinical diagnosis of zoster; viral swab/PCR if uncertain
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Zoster is clinical; swab if the rash is atypical.
